_meta.name: okta-remove-user-from-group
_meta.description: Remove an Okta user from a group. Navigates to the user's profile Groups tab, finds the target group row, and clicks the remove (X) button.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

group_name.description: Name of the group to remove the user from

anomalies: 'Everyone' group cannot be removed (system-managed) — click will likely fail silently or show error
Remove icon may be an X button on the group row — revealed on hover in some Okta versions
Okta Classic had inline X icons; Okta OIE may use a different pattern — perceive to confirm

chain.note: Perceive groups tab. Find target group row. Look for inline remove button or action column.
Hover/click on target group row to reveal remove action. If Okta shows an X/remove inline, click it instead.
Perceive row actions revealed. Look for X button, 'Remove', 'Unassign' action.
Click Remove. Fallbacks: 'Unassign', 'Delete'. If X icon only: use click on the icon element.
Verify group no longer appears in user's group list.
